content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 DesignFiles: Content Marketing Coordinator Anywhere in the World Ontario Sales and Marketing Contract <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Canada <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://designfiles.co/">https://designfiles.co/</a> </p> <p><strong>About the job:</strong></p> <p>We're looking for a highly organized Content Marketing Coordinator to join our team on a remote contract basis.</p> <p>This role is ideal for someone who loves turning ideas into finished marketing campaigns. You'll write content, coordinate creative assets, keep projects moving, and make sure every email, social post, landing page, and product announcement is polished before it reaches our audience.</p> <p>We're not looking for flashy marketing copy. We're looking for someone who can communicate like a real human, who can write the way you'd talk to a designer over coffee: helpful, clear, and genuinely useful.</p> <p>If you're someone who notices the small details, enjoys keeping projects organized, and gets satisfaction from shipping great work, we'd love to hear from you.</p> <p><strong>What you’ll help with:</strong></p> <p>You'll work closely with our marketing and product teams to help bring campaigns to life by:</p> <ul> <li> <p>Writing and editing marketing emails, newsletters, social posts, ads, landing pages, product updates, and promotional copy</p> </li> <li> <p>Turning campaign ideas, product launches, and feature updates into clear action plans, timelines, and deliverables</p> </li> <li> <p>Coordinating with designers to create graphics, creative assets, and revisions</p> </li> <li> <p>Gathering screenshots, product details, customer examples, links, and supporting materials needed for marketing projects</p> </li> <li> <p>Scheduling and publishing emails, social content, and other marketing updates</p> </li> <li> <p>Helping execute product launches, webinars, contests, promotions, and campaigns</p> </li> <li> <p>Reviewing marketing assets before they go live to ensure quality and accuracy</p> </li> <li> <p>Keeping marketing calendars, task lists, and project documentation organized and up to date</p> </li> <li> <p>Following up with team members to keep projects moving and deadlines on track</p> </li> </ul> <p><strong>What you’ll need:</strong></p> <ul> <li> <p>Excellent writing and editing skills</p> </li> <li> <p>Able to write marketing that feels like a helpful one-on-one conversation, not generic sales copy</p> </li> <li> <p>Strong understanding of audience, tone, and clear communication</p> </li> <li> <p>Exceptional organization and attention to detail (this is one of the most important parts of the role)</p> </li> <li> <p>Comfortable managing multiple projects at once without losing track of details</p> </li> <li> <p>Reliable follow-through and a bias toward getting things done</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience with email marketing, social media, content marketing, or campaign execution</p> </li> </ul> <p><strong>Bonus points:</strong></p> <ul> <li> <p>Experience working with SaaS companies</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience in the interior design industry or another creative field</p> </li> </ul> <p><strong>About us:</strong></p> <p>DesignFiles is an all-in-one business platform built specifically for interior designers. Thousands of designers use DesignFiles to manage projects, collaborate with clients, create presentations, source products, and run more profitable businesses.</p> <p>Everything we create is designed to make designers' lives easier, and our marketing reflects that. We focus on education, practical advice, and helping designers succeed—not pushy sales tactics.</p> <p><strong>Apply for the job:</strong></p> <p>Love writing clear, helpful content and keeping marketing projects moving? Join DesignFiles as a remote Content Marketing Coordinator.</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/designfiles-content-marketing-coordinator">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/designfiles-content-marketing-coordinator</a></p> Mon, 29 Jun 2026 17:01:17 +0000 Wed, 29 Jul 2026 17:01:17 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/designfiles-content-marketing-coordinator https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/designfiles-content-marketing-coordinator Impact Clients: Client Success Coach (CSM) Anywhere in the World Management and Finance Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5684/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> any, California, United States <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.highperformancetrain.com/">https://www.highperformancetrain.com/</a> </p> <p><a href="https://www.youtube.com/richardyu1" class="external"></a>We're looking for a&nbsp;full-time Client Success Coach&nbsp;to join our fast-growing team at Richard Yu's online education company. Our mission is simple:&nbsp;help everyday people launch impactful online digital arbitrage businesses&nbsp;that transform lives—starting with their own.<br><br>If you're someone who loves mentorship, thrives in a high-performance environment, and wants to make a real difference in people's lives, keep reading.<br><br><strong>About Us:</strong><br>Richard Yu is an online business coach with:<br></p> <ul> <li>100K+ subscribers on YouTube&nbsp;→&nbsp;<a href="http://youtube.com/richardyu1" class="external">youtube.com/richardyu1</a> </li> <li>A growing personal brand on Instagram&nbsp;→&nbsp;<a href="http://instagram.com/richardyuzee" class="external">instagram.com/richardyuzee</a> </li> </ul> <p>Our company is fast-paced, and rooted in service. We're building a world-class education platform to help people turn their knowledge into income through coaching and consulting.<br><br><strong>About The Role:</strong><br>This is a&nbsp;remote, full-time&nbsp;position. You must be available during&nbsp;8AM-5PM EST, Monday to Friday. On average, you'll work&nbsp;up to 9 hours per day, and some days will require a little more effort of 10 hours.<br><br>You must currently live in&nbsp;North America, Europe, or South Africa, and speak fluent, accent-neutral English. Clear communication is non-negotiable, we're in the coaching business.</p> <p><strong>Requirements</strong></p> <p><strong>Here are the requirements:</strong></p> <ul><li>You must be able to commit full time hours (Our office hours are 9 AM - 6 PM EST, though if you are different time zones we're super open minded)&nbsp;</li></ul> <ul> <li>You will be conducting new onboarding calls daily to welcome in new students.</li> <li>You will be c
